articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Getting Ready To Explode: Analyst Presents 16,500% Blowout
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has been stuck in an accumulation zone for a couple of months now and has not seen the kind of run-up other large cryptocurrencies have experienced. This continued accumulation as well as trading in a very tight range could mean a very significant breakout when it finally happens and one crypto analyst has predicted an incredible surge along these lines. articles.title: Bitcoin At Risk Of 50% Drop Before Next Halving If Historical Trend Repeats, Warns Influential Crypto Guru
articles.description: Bitcoin hit a two-month high earlier today following amendments to a spot ETF application by Fidelity, but some forecasts still see the alpha cryptocurrency dropping considerably in the coming months before the next halving.

articles.title: Stellar, Early Blockchain Built for Payments, Adds Smart Contracts to Take on Ethereum
articles.description: The nine-year-old project, one of the earliest major blockchains, is getting a facelift to incorporate "smart contracts," that theoretically could attract new applications and users – and potentially more demand for the XLM token.
